caption: A man is seated in a studio setting, wearing a black t-shirt with the words "CHECK IT MAN" across the chest and a black baseball cap. He has headphones on and is positioned in front of a professional microphone on a stand. He wears a gold chain and jewelry on both wrists. In the background, a white wall features gold stars and a logo that reads "HUSTLE." To the right, a banner displays the word "BOSS" in large red letters. On-screen overlays include a logo for "T TALK PODCAST" and text that reads "BOSS TALK 101 By ISee Everything." Across the sequence, the man adjusts his headphones with both hands, shifting his gaze slightly. As the sequence progresses, he moves his hands away from his head, gesturing with his right hand raised as he continues to speak.
